fields.name: hero
fields.label: Hero Slider
fields.description: The main homepage hero is now a true slider with one or more slides. Open a slide under Slides to edit its Background Image, Feature Image / Portrait, video, badges, and overlay panels.

fields.name: autoplay_seconds
fields.label: Default Autoplay Seconds
fields.description: Fallback timing for the slider. Each slide can override this with its own duration. Use 0 to disable autoplay.

fields.name: primary_cta_url
fields.label: Default Primary CTA URL
fields.description: Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: secondary_cta_url
fields.label: Default Secondary CTA URL
fields.description: Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: slides
fields.label: Slides
fields.description: Build the slider with one or more slides. Open a slide item to edit its Background Image, Feature Image / Portrait, video, badges, and overlay panels.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Slide Name
fields.description: Internal label shown in Tina for this slide.

fields.name: tab_label
fields.label: Tab Label
fields.description: Short label used in the slider navigation. Defaults to the slide name or heading.

fields.name: duration_seconds
fields.label: Slide Duration (seconds)
fields.description: How long this slide should stay active before rotating. Leave empty to use the slider default.

fields.name: effects
fields.label: Overlay Effects
fields.description: Stack subtle overlays like particles, grid lines, glow orbs, scanlines, or a mobile-only glow on top of the slide.

fields.name: eyebrow
fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.description: Small label above the slide heading.

fields.name: heading_font
fields.label: Heading Font
fields.description: Choose which site font this hero slide should use.

fields.name: heading_size
fields.label: Heading Size
fields.description: Use Compact for longer headings so the words breathe.

fields.name: background_image
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Main full-bleed image for this slide. Use a file from /public. Overlay panels can use an image, or a short .mp4/.webm path entered manually. Blank values are treated as empty so you can safely remove and replace slide artwork.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Feature Image / Portrait
fields.description: Optional portrait or feature image that sits above the background. Use a file from /public. Overlay panels can use an image, or a short .mp4/.webm path entered manually. Blank values are treated as empty so you can safely remove and replace slide artwork.

fields.name: video_url
fields.label: Background Video URL
fields.description: Optional path to an .mp4 or .webm inside /public, for example /videos/hero/reel.mp4

fields.name: video_poster_image
fields.label: Video Poster Image
fields.description: Fallback image shown before the video loads, or when no video is available. Use a file from /public. Overlay panels can use an image, or a short .mp4/.webm path entered manually. Blank values are treated as empty so you can safely remove and replace slide artwork.

fields.name: panels
fields.label: Overlay Panels
fields.description: Floating image or type panels layered on top of the slide.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image / Video
fields.description: Use a file from /public. Overlay panels can use an image, or a short .mp4/.webm path entered manually. Blank values are treated as empty so you can safely remove and replace slide artwork.

fields.name: top
fields.label: Top Position
fields.description: CSS value such as 8% or 7rem

fields.name: left
fields.label: Left Position
fields.description: CSS value such as 62% or 2rem

fields.name: width
fields.label: Width
fields.description: CSS value such as 18% or 14rem

fields.name: rotate
fields.label: Rotation
fields.description: CSS angle such as -4deg

fields.name: graffiti
fields.label: Graffiti Notes
fields.description: Loose handwritten notes used by the poster and mural layouts.

fields.name: top
fields.label: Top Position
fields.description: CSS value such as 16%

fields.name: left
fields.label: Left Position
fields.description: CSS value such as 72%

fields.name: rotate
fields.label: Rotation
fields.description: CSS angle such as 5deg

fields.name: primary_cta_text
fields.label: Primary CTA Text
fields.description: Optional per-slide override. Leave empty to use the slider default.

fields.name: primary_cta_url
fields.label: Primary CTA URL
fields.description: Optional per-slide override. Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: secondary_cta_text
fields.label: Secondary CTA Text
fields.description: Optional per-slide override. Leave empty to use the slider default.

fields.name: secondary_cta_url
fields.label: Secondary CTA URL
fields.description: Optional per-slide override. Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: blocks
fields.label: Components
fields.description: Add, reorder, and duplicate reusable page components.

fields.name: cta_url
fields.label: Primary CTA URL
fields.description: Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: cta_secondary_url
fields.label: Secondary CTA URL
fields.description: Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.label: Default Autoplay Seconds
fields.description: Fallback timing for the slider. Each slide can override this with its own duration. Use 0 to disable autoplay.

fields.description: e.g. "Available Australia-wide"

fields.label: Location Detail
fields.description: e.g. "Available Australia-wide"

fields.name: blocks
fields.label: Components
fields.description: Add, reorder, and duplicate reusable page components.

fields.name: cta_url
fields.label: Primary CTA URL
fields.description: Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: cta_secondary_url
fields.label: Secondary CTA URL
fields.description: Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: autoplay_seconds
fields.label: Default Autoplay Seconds
fields.description: Fallback timing for the slider. Each slide can override this with its own duration. Use 0 to disable autoplay.

fields.name: primary_cta_url
fields.label: Default Primary CTA URL
fields.description: Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: secondary_cta_url
fields.label: Default Secondary CTA URL
fields.description: Enter a site path (e.g. /about) or full URL

fields.name: slides
fields.label: Slides
fields.description: Build the slider with one or more slides. Open a slide item to edit its Background Image, Feature Image / Portrait, video, badges, and overlay panels.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Slide Name
fields.description: Internal label shown in Tina for this slide.

fields.name: tab_label
fields.label: Tab Label
fields.description: Short label used in the slider navigation. Defaults to the slide name or heading.

fields.name: duration_seconds
fields.label: Slide Duration (seconds)
fields.description: How long this slide should stay active before rotating. Leave empty to use the slider default.

fields.name: effects
fields.label: Overlay Effects
fields.description: Stack subtle overlays like particles, grid lines, glow orbs, scanlines, or a mobile-only glow on top of the slide.

fields.name: eyebrow
fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.description: Small label above the slide heading.

fields.name: heading_font
fields.label: Heading Font
fields.description: Choose which site font this hero slide should use.

fields.name: heading_size
fields.label: Heading Size
fields.description: Use Compact for longer headings so the words breathe.

fields.name: background_image
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Main full-bleed image for this slide. Use a file from /public. Overlay panels can use an image, or a short .mp4/.webm path entered manually. Blank values are treated as empty so you can safely remove and replace slide artwork.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Feature Image / Portrait
fields.description: Optional portrait or feature image that sits above the background. Use a file from /public. Overlay panels can use an image, or a short .mp4/.webm path entered manually. Blank values are treated as empty so you can safely remove and replace slide artwork.

fields.name: video_url
fields.label: Background Video URL
fields.description: Optional path to an .mp4 or .webm inside /public, for example /videos/hero/reel.mp4

fields.name: video_poster_image
fields.label: Video Poster Image
fields.description: Fallback image shown before the video loads, or when no video is available. Use a file from /public. Overlay panels can use an image, or a short .mp4/.webm path entered manually. Blank values are treated as empty so you can safely remove and replace slide artwork.

fields.name: panels
fields.label: Overlay Panels
fields.description: Floating image or type panels layered on top of the slide.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image / Video
fields.description: Use a file from /public. Overlay panels can use an image, or a short .mp4/.webm path entered manually. Blank values are treated as empty so you can safely remove and replace slide artwork.

fields.name: top
fields.label: Top Position
fields.description: CSS value such as 8% or 7rem

fields.name: left
fields.label: Left Position
fields.description: CSS value such as 62% or 2rem

fields.name: width
fields.label: Width
fields.description: CSS value such as 18% or 14rem

fields.name: rotate
fields.label: Rotation
fields.description: CSS angle such as -4deg

fields.name: graffiti
fields.label: Graffiti Notes
fields.description: Loose handwritten notes used by the poster and mural layouts.

fields.description: CSS value such as 16%

fields.label: Left Position
fields.description: CSS value such as 72%

fields.description: CSS angle such as 5deg

fields.description: Use text for the simplest setup, initials for a generated mark, or image once you upload a real logo.

fields.label: Logo Text
fields.description: Shown as the wordmark and fallback alt text.

fields.label: Logo Initials
fields.description: Used when Logo Style is set to Initials mark.

fields.name: logo_image_light
fields.label: Logo Image (Light Surfaces)
fields.description: Optional logo asset used on light backgrounds. Stored from /public/images.

fields.name: logo_image_dark
fields.label: Logo Image (Dark Surfaces)
fields.description: Optional logo asset used on dark backgrounds. Stored from /public/images.

fields.name: font_preset
fields.label: Site Font Pairing
fields.description: Fastest option for beginners. Pick a complete heading, body, hero, and logo font set.

fields.name: heading_font
fields.label: Heading Font Override
fields.description: Optional. Leave this as the pairing default unless you want a specific heading font.

fields.name: body_font
fields.label: Body Font Override
fields.description: Optional. This controls paragraphs, buttons, badges, and most interface text.

fields.name: hero_font
fields.label: Hero Heading Font Override
fields.description: Optional. This is the default font used by hero slider headings.

fields.name: logo_font
fields.label: Logo Text Font
fields.description: Choose the font used when the logo is rendered as text.

fields.name: primary
fields.label: Canvas
fields.description: Pick the main page background colour.

fields.name: primary_soft
fields.label: Canvas Soft
fields.description: Used in gradients and softer light surfaces.

fields.name: accent
fields.label: Accent
fields.description: Primary accent for links, dividers, and key UI moments.

fields.name: accent_light
fields.label: Accent Light
fields.description: Hover and lighter accent variant.

fields.name: text

fields.description: Primary body text colour.

fields.name: muted

fields.description: Secondary text and metadata colour.

fields.name: surface

fields.description: Card and panel background colour.

fields.name: surface_alt

fields.description: Alternate section and card background colour.

fields.name: border

fields.description: Border and rule colour.

fields.name: champagne
fields.label: Heading Ink

fields.name: ink

fields.description: Dark solid button and deep UI colour.

fields.name: dark_surface

fields.description: Main dark-theme section background colour.

fields.label: Dark Accent Light
fields.description: Hover and lighter accent for dark sections.

fields.description: Basic site-wide layout choices. These are safe starting points for non-technical users before deeper agent-led customisation.
